requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz, Type C/E Plug, IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1 Alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz，C/E型插头，IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1接轨
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz，C/E型插頭，IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1接軌

summary.en: Cameroon operates on 220 V / 50 Hz mains supply with Type C and Type E (French-style) plugs and sockets, inherited from French colonial infrastructure. Electronic and telecom equipment must be designed and rated for 220 V / 50 Hz. Products designed for 110 V (US standard) or 100–240 V universal supply must be verified for 220 V / 50 Hz compatibility. Electrical safety standards referenced by ANOR are generally aligned with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT, and communications equipment safety) and IEC 60950-1 (legacy). ANOR may require electrical safety test reports as part of the ART homologation dossier. Chinese GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) test data may serve as a reference but is not formally recognised by ANOR as equivalent.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆电网采用220V/50Hz供电，使用C型和E型（法式）插头和插座，沿承法国殖民地基础设施。电子和电信设备须针对220V/50Hz进行设计和额定。适用110V（美国标准）或100-240V通用电源的产品须验证与220V/50Hz的兼容性。ANOR参考的电气安全标准总体上与IEC 62368-1（音视频、IT及通信设备安全）和IEC 60950-1（历史版本）接轨。ANOR可能在ART同质化文件中要求提供电气安全测试报告。中国GB 4943.1（等同于IEC 60950-1）测试数据可作为参考，但不被ANOR正式承认为等效认可。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆電網採用220V/50Hz供電，使用C型和E型（法式）插頭和插座，沿承法國殖民地基礎設施。電子和電信設備須針對220V/50Hz進行設計和額定。適用110V（美國標準）或100-240V通用電源的產品須驗證與220V/50Hz的相容性。ANOR參考的電氣安全標準總體上與IEC 62368-1（音視頻、IT及通信設備安全）和IEC 60950-1（歷史版本）接軌。ANOR可能在ART同質化文件中要求提供電氣安全測試報告。中國GB 4943.1（等同於IEC 60950-1）測試數據可作為參考，但不被ANOR正式承認為等效認可。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications equipment safety) — ANOR/NC reference
IEC 60950-1 (legacy IT equipment safety) — ANOR/NC reference

summary.en: Chinese electronic and IT equipment is subject to GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) under CCC (China Compulsory Certification). China is transitioning to GB 4943.23 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1). Chinese mains is 220 V / 50 Hz (same voltage), but plug type is Type A/I (GB 2099 standard) — not compatible with Cameroonian Type C/E sockets without an adapter. Products with universal power supplies (100–240 V) require no voltage re-engineering for Cameroon.
summary.zh: 中国电子和IT设备须通过CCC（中国强制认证）满足GB 4943.1（等同于IEC 60950-1）的要求。中国正在向GB 4943.23（等同于IEC 62368-1）过渡。中国电网同为220V/50Hz（电压相同），但插头型号为A/I型（GB 2099标准）——无适配器时与喀麦隆C/E型插座不兼容。采用通用电源（100-240V）的产品无需为喀麦隆市场进行电压重新设计。
summary.zht: 中國電子和IT設備須通過CCC（中國強制認證）滿足GB 4943.1（等同於IEC 60950-1）的要求。中國正在向GB 4943.23（等同於IEC 62368-1）過渡。中國電網同為220V/50Hz（電壓相同），但插頭型號為A/I型（GB 2099標準）——無適配器時與喀麥隆C/E型插座不相容。採用通用電源（100-240V）的產品無需為喀麥隆市場進行電壓重新設計。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for IT and AV equipment
China mains: 220 V / 50 Hz; plug type A/I (GB 2099)

gap.en: Partial gap: Voltage is the same (220 V / 50 Hz), which eliminates the voltage conversion issue common with US-bound exports. However, plug type differs (Chinese A/I vs Cameroonian C/E). Products with universal power supplies and IEC 62368-1 / GB 4943.1 safety certification reduce the gap, but ANOR does not formally recognise CCC as equivalent. IEC 62368-1-referenced test reports from accredited laboratories are recommended for the ART homologation dossier.
gap.zh: 部分差距：电压相同（220V/50Hz），消除了出口美国时常见的电压转换问题。然而，插头型号不同（中国A/I型与喀麦隆C/E型）。采用通用电源和IEC 62368-1 / GB 4943.1安全认证的产品可缩小差距，但ANOR不正式承认CCC作为等效认可。建议在ART同质化文件中提供经认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1标准参考测试报告。
gap.zht: 部分差距：電壓相同（220V/50Hz），消除了出口美國時常見的電壓轉換問題。然而，插頭型號不同（中國A/I型與喀麥隆C/E型）。採用通用電源和IEC 62368-1 / GB 4943.1安全認證的產品可縮小差距，但ANOR不正式承認CCC作為等效認可。建議在ART同質化文件中提供經認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1標準參考測試報告。

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroun)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Products must be rated for 220 V / 50 Hz and fitted with or supplied with Type C/E plugs for the Cameroonian market. IEC 62368-1-aligned safety test reports from accredited laboratories are recommended for ART homologation. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification is not formally recognised by ANOR but provides a useful technical baseline given IEC alignment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品须额定220V/50Hz，并为喀麦隆市场配备或附带C/E型插头。建议为ART同质化认证提供经认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1接轨安全测试报告。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不被ANOR正式承认，但鉴于其与IEC接轨，可提供有用的技术基准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品須額定220V/50Hz，並為喀麥隆市場配備或附帶C/E型插頭。建議為ART同質化認證提供經認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1接軌安全測試報告。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不被ANOR正式承認，但鑒於其與IEC接軌，可提供有用的技術基準。
